programme.desc: While Ivan faces a difficult family situation, Marinette finds a letter addressed to Adrien from his father.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: A beloved horror musical celebrates its 50th anniversary; despite her fear of scary shows, Marinette attends with Adrien; Nelson uses Prem to create tension between Rose and Juleka.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
